data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — onboarding SKILL.md: 0 AskUserQuestion refs, Phase-based structure, has all config keys (ci.*, version.file_path, tickets.prefix, commands.*, jira.project, format.*), has Phase 3 completion, has JIRA_URL/JIRA_USER/JIRA_API_TOKEN, has merge.ci_workflow_name deprecation migration, has .github/workflows references, has sequential/one-at-a-time language
